item2_leadership.note: All 9 officers/directors extracted with full roles and tenure in A1. No additional thickening needed.

restrictions: Must comply with all product/supplier requirements
Cannot use Marks online without consent
Cannot operate competing Asian food at same facility
rights: Terminate if venue contract expires without default

obligations: Blanket lien on all property (current and future, tangible and intangible)
restrictions: No transfer of ownership resulting in <50% voting power without consent
Must maintain insurance and provide attestation of compliance
triggers: Default: failure to pay, cross-default, judgment over $100K, insolvency, bankruptcy, transfer of ownership, sale of assets, devalued collateral

obligations: Complete all initial training before opening
Maintain minimum staffing and certifications at all times
Operations Training Leader recommended at 5+ locations
Must wear Panda Express uniforms at all times during operations
restrictions: Cannot modify training schedule without franchisor approval
Store Manager must be on-site at all times during operating hours

obligations: Comply with performance standards at sole expense
Cooperate with inspections at any time
restrictions: Cannot market through Internet or non-restaurant channels
Must replace Asian concept with Panda Express if opportunity arises
rights: Can terminate Operating Term if venue contract expires without default (with penalty)
triggers: Venue closure termination requires 90 days notice + min royalty 90 days + 24 months royalties

obligations: Follow franchisor rules for Mark usage
Cannot use Marks with modifying words/designs/symbols
Notify franchisor of any infringement or challenge
Comply with directions to modify/discontinue Mark usage at own expense
rights: IP indemnification for proper use of Marks

obligations: Must use wok support ring if required/approved
Cannot reproduce/exhibit Manual portions to non-employees
Store Manager on-site during all operating hours
SM change requires prior written approval
Personal guaranty (all owners; spouse/domestic partner co-sign possible)
Bi-weekly project updates during 6 months pre-opening
Notify franchisor of any government actions/citations
restrictions: SM may be required to be solely dedicated to Panda Express
All employees must wear Panda Express uniforms

obligations: Offer only authorized Products and Services
Must offer core and regional menu items
Brand Refresh at year 5; complete update at year 10
restrictions: No competing Asian food at same facility
Cannot sublicense right to serve Asian food
